def: To embarrass with difficulties; to make a bungle or botch of.[Local, U. S.]
The conversion of cell walls into a material which repelswater, as in cork.
Having wheels of the same size or diameter; having equalrotation. [R.]
Although. [Reformed spelling] Alt"horn`, n. Etym: [Alt + horn.](Mus.)
The act of frustrating; disappointment; defeat; as, thefrustration of one's designs
Disembarkation.The debarkation, therefore, had to take place by small steamers. U.S. Grant.
Obscuration of the field of vision due to the appearance of adark spot before the eye.
To merit or deserve beforehand. [Obs.] Eikon Basi

A large, amphibious, herbivorous mammal (Hippopotamusamphibius), common in the rivers of Africa. It is allied to the hogs,and has a very thick, naked skin, a thick and square head, a verylarge muzzle, small eyes and ears, thick and heavy body, and shortlegs. It is supposed to be the behemoth of the Bible. Called alsozeekoe, and river horse. A smaller species (H. Liberiencis) inhabitsWestern Africa.
The bill or beak of a bird; the neb.
A compound of sucrose (or of some related carbohydrate) withsome base, after the analogy of a salt; as, sodium sucrate.
